calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-29-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-29-2004 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Terms of settlement on the record; Stipulated Judgment for plaintiff against defendant for $5,100 ( $1300 past rent; $900 rent for Nov; $900 rent for Dec; attorney fees & cost pursuant to cost bill $2000 ); plaintiff to give $500 to defendant as move out cost; Restitution & Possession of property located at 213B 6th Ave.; Stayed till 1/1/05 if defendant moves out x 12/31/04; leave premises in broom clean condition; security deposit will be forefeited; each side waives claim against each other; both sides stipulate to terms of judgment; Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause comes on for unlawful detainer settlement conference.
Appearances: Walter Gerard Parsley, Esq. for Plaintiff; Maria B. Lublin and Vivian Gonzalez, defendants in pro per.
Settlement conference held; matter does not settle.
Judge Pro Tem: Bradford Nilsson; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; not reported. (D. 218)
